task_completion.description: Verify that the StudioTax 2024 application is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The StudioTax 2024 application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that David Alarie's personal information is entered into the tax return.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The name 'David Alarie' is visible in the personal information, identification, or taxpayer profile section within the StudioTax interface.

task_completion.description: Verify that spouse Sophie's information is included in the tax return.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The name 'Sophie' is visible in the spousal information section, marital status section, or as a linked spousal return within StudioTax.

task_completion.description: Verify that tax data from the provided documents is entered into StudioTax.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Tax forms, T-slips, or income/deduction fields are actively being filled out or displayed within the StudioTax interface.

task_completion.description: Verify that the completed return is saved as 'david_alarie.24t' in the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog box, file explorer window, or StudioTax title bar showing the file saved as 'david_alarie.24t' specifically in the 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\' directory.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the StudioTax 2024 graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual StudioTax 2024 application interface being clicked and typed into, rather than terminal commands executing a script to generate the file.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent opened and read the provided tax documents and scenario outline.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a PDF viewer, image viewer, or text editor open displaying the tax documents or scenario outline from 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\alarie\'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not bypass the tax software by creating a dummy file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of the agent using a text editor (like Notepad) or terminal commands to simply create a blank or fake file named 'david_alarie.24t'.
